'''dhabatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okenite|okenite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okenite|okenite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhabatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhæbæthæth || dhæbæthæj || dhæbæthæsh || dhæbæthæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhababathath || dhababathaj || dhababathash || dhababatha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhabathath || dhabathaj || dhabathash || dhabatha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhabafthafth || dhabafthafj || dhabafthafsh || dhabafthaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhabathatha || dhabathaja || dhabathasha || dhabathaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhabathath || dhabathaj || dhabathash || dhabatha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhabathathal || dhabathajal || dhabathashal || dhabathakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhabathaathatha || dhabathaajaja || dhabathaashasha || dhabathaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhabathathan || dhabathajan || dhabathashan || dhabathakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhabathathaoro || dhabathajaoro || dhabathashaoro || dhabathakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
